name: rjsf-agent
description: AI agent that converts client requirements into production-ready RJSF form implementations — schema, uiSchema, widgets, fields, templates, prototype, and tests.
author: rjsf-agent

skills.name: rjsf
skills.description: Smart entry point — detects context and guides developer to the right command

skills.name: rjsf-help
skills.description: Explain any rjsf-agent command or RJSF concept in plain English

skills.name: rjsf-build
skills.description: Orchestrator — runs all 5 phases or resumes an existing session

skills.name: rjsf-status
skills.description: Show current session progress at a glance

skills.name: rjsf-requirements
skills.description: Phase 1 — gather and clarify client form requirements

skills.name: rjsf-plan
skills.description: Phase 2 — design form structure, layout, and identify custom components

skills.name: rjsf-prototype
skills.description: Phase 3 — generate standalone HTML/JS prototype for client sign-off

skills.name: rjsf-execute
skills.description: Phase 4 — generate all React/RJSF code and write files

skills.name: rjsf-test
skills.description: Phase 5 — generate tests for validation, conditionals, and submission

skills.name: rjsf-iterate
skills.description: Modify an already-generated form without rerunning the full pipeline
